objective: Replace manual browser lifecycle with Crawlee PlaywrightCrawler. Delete boilerplate (retry, rate-limit, browser management). Maintain backward-compatible JSONL output.
non_goals: No automated scheduler for competitor intel

completed: Rewrote scripts/competitor-ads-intel.ts (268 lines, was 285 after S1).
Deleted ~326 lines from pipeline.ts (was 546, now 220): browser lifecycle, retry, sleep/jitter, processPostWithRetry, processPostIsolated.
gaps: No end-to-end verification run performed yet (needs Ollama + Playwright available).
No unit tests for new modules yet.
crawler/ and discovery/ directories: crawler/ done, discovery/ still empty (Session 3).

acceptance_criteria_met: Manual browser lifecycle deleted from pipeline.ts — YES
Manual retry loop deleted from pipeline.ts — YES
Manual rate limiting deleted from pipeline.ts — YES
decisions: Polyfill injected via page.context().addInitScript() in handler, then page re-navigated to same URL.
OCR/VLM calls happen within the same request handler; 300s requestHandlerTimeoutSecs covers them.
Within-run dedup moved to pre-queue filtering (SQLite isRecordKnown before queue.addRequest).
SQLite sync happens after crawler.run() completes, iterating Dataset items for insertRecord/upsertVendorProfile.
pipeline.ts reduced to pure utilities: CSV parser, content selector, image collector, text extractors.
constraints: Manual execution only; no automated scheduler for competitor intel.
Do not log secrets or credentials.
JSONL output format must remain backward compatible through all refactoring sessions.
next_actions: Session 4: Add unit tests for pure functions.
practical_recommendations: Run: npx tsc --noEmit to verify TypeScript compilation.
End-to-end verification: run with same CSV as before, compare JSONL output to pre-refactoring baseline.
See /parent/marketing-automation/.planning/spec-kit/refs/competitor-intel-roadmap.md for the full multi-session plan.
Crawlee stores data in local Dataset (SQLite-based at ./storage/datasets/default) — this is separate from our competitor-ad-sqlite.db.
